content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach operates from a clearly VIEW-aligned state throughout. Pace is consistently slower than the client's analytical rush — short, single questions held with silence rather than stacked or strategic probes. There is no agenda to dismantle parts work, no framework comparison, no fixing energy; the coach simply keeps inviting the client back to the felt layer underneath the narration ('What if the understanding is the paralysis?', 'What's it like to just let that be true...', 'Can you stay with the loss itself...'). Empathy is felt rather than performed — turn 12 ('Don't apologize. The grief is still here.') is presence, not a sympathy noise. Impartiality is intact: when the client self-corrects back into IFS language, the coach neither validates nor criticizes the framework, just stays with what's alive. Wonder is directed at the actual phenomenon (the smile, the missing thing, the not-knowing) rather than generic 'what's underneath' probing. The main thing keeping this from being a textbook 3 is the absence of explicit first-person vulnerability from the coach ('I notice I want to...'), but the undefended, unhurried quality is so consistent that 2 would underrate it.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single, curious question pointed at the live phenomenon (the smile). No agenda, no stacking."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offered as a wondering, not a teaching. Coach does not defend it when client pushes back in turn 5."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Coach does not engage the framework comparison the client invited. Returns to the person, not the model — impartial stance toward IFS preserved."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects back what's true without analysis, then invites staying with it 'without the reframe.' Pace slows; no rush to insight."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Yeah.' Holds silence and simply invites another moment. Undefended, unhurried; trusts the process."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Don't apologize. The grief is still here.' Empathy felt, not performed. Refuses the client's pull back into framework-talk without correcting them."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Releases any need for the client to land somewhere ('You don't have to do anything with it right now'), then opens wonder toward the not-knowing itself."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift"],
  "notes": "Stance is excellent even though several signature moves (the awareness-locating question, paradoxical instruction) were not used — those belong to Methodology Fidelity. The coach's state is the strength here."
}
